question_text: Which circuit diagram symbol represents a switch?

options.label: A
options.text: A circle with a cross inside it

options.label: B
options.text: A gap in the wire with a lever that can open or close the circuit

explanation: A switch is shown as a gap in a wire with a lever or arm that can swing to either break or complete the circuit. When the lever touches both sides of the gap, the circuit is closed (on); when it swings away, the circuit is open (off).
